data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 12/27 (Mon), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty & Commissions  will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students!

🗓️Period: 12/27 (Mon) 19:00 – 1/3 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
